title: Floral Velvety Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Brazilian dish featuring tahini paste and a floral twist, perfect for a summer evening. This recipe is FODMAP-friendly and easy to make.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine tahini paste, coconut milk, honey, lime juice, and olive oil. Blend until smooth.
Add minced garlic-infused oil, dried rose petals, salt, and black pepper to the blender. Blend until well combined.
Place the chicken pieces in a large bowl and pour the marinade over them. Mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional dried rose petals if desired.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as grilled vegetables or quinoa.
